description_long: This object is a rectangular, slightly domed pastry with a thick, smooth layer of white icing covering most of its surface. The pastry itself is golden-brown and appears soft and dense, with a few visible cracks and folds along the sides. The icing is opaque and has a matte finish, with some areas showing a slight sheen. The ends of the pastry reveal a light, bread-like interior with a subtle swirl, suggesting a filled or rolled structure. There are no visible toppings or decorations on the surface, and the overall appearance is uniform and compact. The object resembles a bakery item commonly found in urban environments, such as a glazed croissant or sweet roll.
description: A rectangular, golden-brown pastry with a thick, smooth white icing layer and a soft, bread-like interior. The surface is matte and uniform, with no visible toppings.
description_view_0: The top and side of the pastry are visible, showing a smooth, thick layer of white icing covering most of the golden-brown surface.
description_view_1: The end of the pastry is shown, revealing the light, bread-like interior and the thickness of the icing layer.
description_view_2: The opposite side is visible, with the icing appearing slightly thinner and more of the golden-brown pastry exposed.
description_view_3: The other end of the pastry is shown, with a rounded, slightly uneven surface and a clear view of the icing's coverage.
